title: Close zero-deferment release readiness
intent: Close PR #47 and the release-readiness milestone with docs, directives, plans, tests, code, and remote PR feedback reviewed; all actionable review feedback addressed; local proof captured; and remaining release gates made explicit.

tasks.description: Review repo directives, docs, plan artifacts, tests, and changed code for current product-contract drift and milestone blockers.
acceptance: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, STANDARDS.md, README.md, docs, .github instructions, .radioactive-ralph plans, tests, and changed code paths are scanned
Obsolete plan artifacts are marked superseded instead of current
No current execution plan asks Ralph to be an MCP server, Claude plugin, or slash-command skill family

tasks.description: Address all actionable remote PR review feedback on PR #47 with traceable code changes and regression tests.
acceptance: renderArgTemplate renders in a deterministic single pass
Template token values are not recursively reprocessed
stream-json provider output accepts frames larger than the former 1 MiB scanner limit
Focused provider tests cover both review comments

tasks.description: Run the local verification commands needed to call the milestone locally proven.
acceptance: Available release-tool checks are run or clearly reported if blocked

tasks.description: Push the closeout commit to PR #47, resolve the review threads, and report any remaining remote or external gate.
acceptance: The two unresolved Gemini review threads are resolved after the fixes are present remotely
PR status, draft state, and any remaining external gates are summarized
